content_body:
140 stores at North Georgia Premium Outlets!

Located just 50 minutes away (45 miles) ~ Find impressive savings at Ann Taylor, Burberry, Coach, Cole Haan, Elie Tahari, Gap Outlet, Hugo Boss, Kate Spade New York, Michael Kors, Nike, Polo Ralph Lauren, Restoration Hardware, Pottery Barn, Saks Fifth Avenue Off 5th, Williams-Sonoma and more.
title: North Georgia Premium Outlets
